question: Which service ( s ) has never been used by any customer ? List their details .
sql: SELECT Service_ID, Service_Details FROM Services WHERE Service_ID NOT IN (SELECT Service_ID FROM Customers_and_Services);

back_translation.intent: 查询未被关联到任何客户的服服务信息
filters: Service_ID NOT IN (SELECT Service_ID FROM Customers_and_Services)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问从未被任何客户使用的服务及其详情，SQL反向翻译描述通过Service_ID NOT IN子查询准确表达了这一意图，且涉及的表、列和操作均符合要求。
